source_note: Keeper Rulebook Luck (p.93-95): investigators may spend Luck points to lower a roll toward a target number, roll Luck as a group, and optionally recover Luck during the Investigator Development Phase.

spend.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.93: spending Luck reduces the rolled total by one for each Luck point spent, potentially turning a failure into a success.

roll.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.93: when several investigators make a Luck roll as a group, use the single lowest individual Luck roll to represent the whole group.

recovery.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.95 (optional): during the Investigator Development Phase, roll 1D100 against current Luck; if the roll is higher than Luck, gain 1D10 Luck points, capped at 99.
